title: Refactor createAdminUser function with msg.caller-based authentication

requirements.text: Remove all usage of Principal.fromText("aaaaa-aa") from the createAdminUser function in backend/main.mo
acceptanceCriteria: No hardcoded Principal.fromText("aaaaa-aa") remains in createAdminUser implementation
Function compiles without errors after removal

requirements.text: Use msg.caller as the admin user ID when creating new admin users in the createAdminUser function
acceptanceCriteria: AdminUser.id field is populated with msg.caller principal
Each admin is uniquely identified by their calling principal

requirements.text: Implement first-admin logic: when adminIdCounter equals 0, automatically assign the #super_admin role and bypass all authorization checks

quotes: Jika adminIdCounter == 0, maka admin pertama otomatis menjadi #super_admin dan bypass authorization

acceptanceCriteria: When adminIdCounter is 0, the new admin receives #super_admin role
First admin creation bypasses session validation and role checks
adminIdCounter increments after successful first admin creation

requirements.text: After the first admin is created, enforce that only users with #super_admin role can create new admin users

quotes: Setelah admin pertama, hanya #super_admin yang boleh membuat admin baru

acceptanceCriteria: Non-super_admin users receive authorization error when attempting to create admin users
Authorization check verifies caller has #super_admin role before proceeding
Error message clearly indicates super_admin privilege is required

requirements.text: Prevent duplicate admin registration by checking if msg.caller principal already exists in adminUsers storage before creating a new admin

quotes: Cegah satu principal membuat lebih dari satu admin

acceptanceCriteria: Function checks adminUsers map for existing entry with msg.caller as key
If principal already has admin account, return error without creating duplicate
Error message indicates the principal already has an admin account

requirements.text: Display the complete final implementation of the refactored createAdminUser function after all changes are applied

quotes: Tampilkan full final code createAdminUser setelah diganti

acceptanceCriteria: Full function source code is visible in build output
Implementation includes all required changes (REQ-1 through REQ-5)
Code is properly formatted and syntactically correct

constraints: Do not modify the AdminUser type structure
Do not modify stable storage declarations or HashMap configuration beyond what is necessary for this function
Do not create a new draft project; modify the existing Mitsubishi Srikandi Subang Version 61 project
All changes must be isolated to the createAdminUser function implementation in backend/main.mo
nonGoals: Modifying other admin-related functions (updateAdminUser, deleteAdminUser, getAllAdminUsers)
Changing the AdminUser data structure or adding new fields
Implementing new authorization middleware or guards outside createAdminUser
Refactoring the overall authentication system architecture
Adding new admin roles beyond #super_admin and #regular_admin
